---
title: "Batch-effect analysis v9"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')`"
---

# Purpose

This is step 5 of the v9 pipeline. It uses the normalized protein matrix from step 3 before group-effect removal, then compares biological experiments between Groups to evaluate batch effect.

# Settings

```{r settings}
load_project_packages(c(
  "data.table", "limma", "ggplot2", "scatterplot3d",
  "matrixStats", "QFeatures", "SummarizedExperiment", "S4Vectors"
))

root <- basic_obj$project_root
pth <- list(
  batch_dir = file.path(root, "Batch_Effect_v9"),
  batch_table = file.path(root, "Batch_Effect_v9", "tables"),
  batch_plots = file.path(root, "Batch_Effect_v9", "plots")
)

dir.create(pth$batch_table, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(pth$batch_plots, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

raw <- data.table::copy(qc_obj$raw_map_filtered)
cond <- as.character(qc_obj$condition_order)

raw[SourceBlock == "20260331", SourceBlock := "RS"]
data.table::setnames(raw, "SourceBlock", "Groups")
raw[, Groups := factor(as.character(Groups), levels = c("RS", "Group1", "Group2", "Group3", "Group4"))]
raw[, Condition := factor(as.character(Condition), levels = cond)]

max_na <- 2 / 3
min_det <- 1
adj_m <- "BH"
alpha <- 0.05
lfc_thr <- 1
plot_font_size <- 16

group_order <- as.character(stats::na.omit(unique(raw$Groups)))
group_colors <- stats::setNames(
  grDevices::hcl.colors(length(group_order), palette = "Dark 3"),
  group_order
)
condition_colors <- stats::setNames(
  c("#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#009E73", "#CC79A7", "#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#F0E442", "#000000")[seq_along(cond)],
  cond
)
```

# Functions

```{r functions}
first_value <- function(x) {
  x[!is.na(x) & x != ""][1]
}

collapse_values <- function(x) {
  paste(sort(unique(x[!is.na(x) & x != ""])), collapse = ";")
}

save_plot <- function(plot, name, width, height) {
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    file.path(pth$batch_plots, paste0(name, ".png")),
    plot,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = 300
  )
}

summarize_to_bio <- function(mat, raw_map) {
  bio <- unique(raw_map[, .(Groups, Condition, BioExperiment, BioRep)])
  data.table::setorder(bio, Groups, Condition, BioRep, BioExperiment)

  mat_bio <- vapply(
    bio$BioExperiment,
    function(x) {
      matrixStats::rowMedians(
        mat[, raw_map[BioExperiment == x, RawFile], drop = FALSE],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    },
    numeric(nrow(mat))
  )

  rownames(mat_bio) <- rownames(mat)
  colnames(mat_bio) <- bio$BioExperiment
  mat_bio[is.nan(mat_bio)] <- NA_real_

  list(mat = mat_bio, bio = bio)
}

make_pca <- function(mat, sample_info) {
  mat <- mat[, sample_info$BioExperiment, drop = FALSE]
  row_median <- matrixStats::rowMedians(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  mat <- mat[is.finite(row_median), , drop = FALSE]
  row_median <- row_median[is.finite(row_median)]

  missing <- which(!is.finite(mat), arr.ind = TRUE)
  mat[missing] <- row_median[missing[, 1]]
  mat <- mat[matrixStats::rowVars(mat) > 0, , drop = FALSE]

  pca <- stats::prcomp(t(mat), center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
  variance <- pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)

  scores <- data.table::as.data.table(
    pca$x[, 1:3, drop = FALSE],
    keep.rownames = "BioExperiment"
  )
  scores <- merge(scores, sample_info, by = "BioExperiment", sort = FALSE)

  attr(scores, "variance") <- variance
  scores
}
```

# Uncorrected Protein Matrix

```{r uncorrected_protein_matrix}
evi_ann <- data.table::copy(clean_evi[RawFile %in% raw$RawFile])

evi_ann[, ProteinID := data.table::fifelse(
  !is.na(`Leading proteins`) & `Leading proteins` != "",
  as.character(`Leading proteins`),
  as.character(Proteins)
)]
evi_ann[, PepSeq := as.character(Sequence)]
evi_ann <- evi_ann[
  !is.na(ProteinID) & ProteinID != "" &
    !is.na(PepSeq) & PepSeq != ""
]
evi_ann[, PepID := paste(ProteinID, PepSeq, sep = "|")]

pep_long <- evi_ann[, .(
  Intensity = sum(Intensity, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(PepID, RawFile)]

pep_wide <- data.table::dcast(
  pep_long,
  PepID ~ RawFile,
  value.var = "Intensity",
  fill = NA_real_
)

raw_keep <- raw[RawFile %in% names(pep_wide), RawFile]
pep_m <- as.matrix(pep_wide[, ..raw_keep])
rownames(pep_m) <- pep_wide$PepID
pep_m[pep_m <= 0] <- NA_real_

pep_anno <- evi_ann[, .(
  Sequence = first_value(PepSeq),
  ProteinID = first_value(ProteinID),
  Gene.names = collapse_values(`Gene names`),
  Protein.names = collapse_values(`Protein names`)
), by = PepID]

pep_anno <- pep_anno[match(rownames(pep_m), PepID)]
raw_info <- raw[match(colnames(pep_m), RawFile)]

pep_se <- SummarizedExperiment::SummarizedExperiment(
  assays = list(intensity = pep_m),
  rowData = S4Vectors::DataFrame(
    as.data.frame(pep_anno[, .(Sequence, ProteinID, Gene.names, Protein.names)])
  ),
  colData = S4Vectors::DataFrame(as.data.frame(raw_info))
)
rownames(pep_se) <- pep_anno$PepID

pep_f <- pep_se |>
  QFeatures::zeroIsNA() |>
  QFeatures::filterNA(pNA = max_na)

qf <- QFeatures::QFeatures(list(peptides = pep_f))
SummarizedExperiment::colData(qf) <- SummarizedExperiment::colData(qf[["peptides"]])

qf <- qf |>
  QFeatures::logTransform(i = "peptides", name = "log_peptides") |>
  QFeatures::normalize(
    i = "log_peptides",
    name = "lognorm_peptides",
    method = "center.median"
  ) |>
  QFeatures::aggregateFeatures(
    i = "lognorm_peptides",
    name = "proteins_uncorrected",
    fcol = "ProteinID",
    fun = matrixStats::colMedians,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

prot_raw <- SummarizedExperiment::assay(qf[["proteins_uncorrected"]])
prot_bio <- summarize_to_bio(prot_raw, raw)
prot_m <- prot_bio$mat
bio <- prot_bio$bio

pep_f_anno <- data.table::as.data.table(
  as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::rowData(qf[["lognorm_peptides"]]))
)

prot_anno <- pep_f_anno[
  !is.na(ProteinID) & ProteinID != "",
  .(
    Gene.names = collapse_values(Gene.names),
    Protein.names = collapse_values(Protein.names),
    Peptides_used = .N
  ),
  by = ProteinID
]
```

# Group Comparisons

```{r group_comparisons}
group_pairs <- utils::combn(group_order, 2, simplify = FALSE)
group_code <- stats::setNames(paste0("G", seq_along(group_order)), group_order)

cmp <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(seq_along(group_pairs), function(i) {
  data.table::data.table(
    ComparisonShortID = sprintf("B%02d", i),
    Reference = group_pairs[[i]][1],
    Target = group_pairs[[i]][2],
    ComparisonID = paste0(group_pairs[[i]][2], "_vs_", group_pairs[[i]][1])
  )
}))

run_group_comparison <- function(cmp_i) {
  reference <- cmp_i$Reference
  target <- cmp_i$Target
  ref_bio <- bio[as.character(Groups) == reference, BioExperiment]
  target_bio <- bio[as.character(Groups) == target, BioExperiment]
  sample_ids <- c(ref_bio, target_bio)

  mat0 <- prot_m[, sample_ids, drop = FALSE]
  n_ref <- rowSums(!is.na(mat0[, ref_bio, drop = FALSE]))
  n_target <- rowSums(!is.na(mat0[, target_bio, drop = FALSE]))
  mat <- mat0[n_ref >= min_det & n_target >= min_det, , drop = FALSE]

  model_data <- bio[match(sample_ids, BioExperiment)]
  model_data[, Code := group_code[as.character(Groups)]]
  model_data[, ModelGroup := factor(Code, levels = group_code[c(reference, target)])]

  design <- stats::model.matrix(~ 0 + ModelGroup, data = model_data)
  colnames(design) <- levels(model_data$ModelGroup)
  contrast <- limma::makeContrasts(
    contrasts = paste0(group_code[[target]], " - ", group_code[[reference]]),
    levels = design
  )

  fit <- limma::lmFit(mat, design) |>
    limma::contrasts.fit(contrast) |>
    limma::eBayes()

  result <- data.table::as.data.table(
    limma::topTable(fit, number = Inf, adjust.method = adj_m, sort.by = "P"),
    keep.rownames = "ProteinID"
  )

  result <- merge(
    result,
    data.table::data.table(
      ProteinID = rownames(mat),
      N_detected_reference = n_ref[rownames(mat)],
      N_detected_target = n_target[rownames(mat)]
    ),
    by = "ProteinID",
    all.x = TRUE
  )
  result <- merge(result, prot_anno, by = "ProteinID", all.x = TRUE)
  result[, `:=`(
    ComparisonShortID = cmp_i$ComparisonShortID,
    ComparisonID = cmp_i$ComparisonID,
    Target = target,
    Reference = reference,
    Significant = adj.P.Val < alpha & abs(logFC) >= lfc_thr
  )]
  result[, Direction := data.table::fcase(
    Significant & logFC > 0, "Higher_in_target",
    Significant & logFC < 0, "Higher_in_reference",
    default = "Not_significant"
  )]

  summary <- data.table::data.table(
    ComparisonShortID = cmp_i$ComparisonShortID,
    ComparisonID = cmp_i$ComparisonID,
    Target = target,
    Reference = reference,
    N_reference = length(ref_bio),
    N_target = length(target_bio),
    Proteins_tested = nrow(result),
    Significant_total = sum(result$Significant),
    Higher_in_target = sum(result$Direction == "Higher_in_target"),
    Higher_in_reference = sum(result$Direction == "Higher_in_reference")
  )

  list(
    result = result[, .(
      ComparisonShortID, ComparisonID, Target, Reference,
      ProteinID, Gene.names, Protein.names,
      logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, Significant, Direction,
      N_detected_reference, N_detected_target, Peptides_used
    )],
    summary = summary
  )
}

analysis <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(cmp)), function(i) run_group_comparison(cmp[i]))
res_lst <- stats::setNames(lapply(analysis, `[[`, "result"), cmp$ComparisonShortID)
cmp_sum <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(analysis, `[[`, "summary"))
res_all <- data.table::rbindlist(res_lst)
sig <- res_all[Significant == TRUE][order(ComparisonID, adj.P.Val, -abs(logFC))]
```

# Save Tables

```{r save_tables}
data.table::fwrite(cmp_sum, file.path(pth$batch_table, "comparison_summary.csv"))
data.table::fwrite(res_all, file.path(pth$batch_table, "all_results.csv"))
data.table::fwrite(sig, file.path(pth$batch_table, "significant_results.csv"))
```

# Protein-Level PCA

```{r protein_pca}
prot_pca <- make_pca(prot_m, bio)
prot_var <- attr(prot_pca, "variance")

p_pca_2d <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  prot_pca,
  ggplot2::aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Groups, shape = Condition)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 3.4, alpha = 0.90) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15, 3, 7, 8, 18, 4)[seq_along(cond)], drop = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Uncorrected protein-level PCA by Groups",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(100 * prot_var[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(100 * prot_var[2], 1), "%)"),
    color = "Groups",
    shape = "Condition"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = plot_font_size) +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right")

save_plot(p_pca_2d, "uncorrected_protein_pca_2d", width = 10, height = 7)
data.table::fwrite(prot_pca, file.path(pth$batch_table, "uncorrected_protein_pca_scores.csv"))
p_pca_2d
```

```{r protein_pca_3d}
grDevices::png(
  file.path(pth$batch_plots, "uncorrected_protein_pca_3d.png"),
  width = 2600,
  height = 2100,
  res = 300
)

scatterplot3d::scatterplot3d(
  x = prot_pca$PC1,
  y = prot_pca$PC2,
  z = prot_pca$PC3,
  color = group_colors[as.character(prot_pca$Groups)],
  pch = c(16, 17, 15, 3, 7, 8, 18, 4)[as.integer(prot_pca$Condition)],
  angle = 45,
  grid = TRUE,
  box = TRUE,
  main = "Uncorrected protein-level PCA by Groups",
  xlab = paste0("PC1 (", round(100 * prot_var[1], 1), "%)"),
  ylab = paste0("PC2 (", round(100 * prot_var[2], 1), "%)"),
  zlab = paste0("PC3 (", round(100 * prot_var[3], 1), "%)")
)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = names(group_colors),
  col = group_colors,
  pch = 16,
  bty = "n",
  cex = 0.9
)

grDevices::dev.off()
```

# Volcano Plots

```{r volcano_plots}
plot_volcano <- function(result) {
  result <- data.table::copy(result)
  result[, neg_log10_adj_p := -log10(pmax(adj.P.Val, .Machine$double.xmin))]
  result[, Call := data.table::fcase(
    Significant & logFC > 0, paste0("Higher in ", Target),
    Significant & logFC < 0, paste0("Higher in ", Reference),
    default = "Not significant"
  )]

  comparison <- result$ComparisonID[1]
  short_id <- result$ComparisonShortID[1]
  call_levels <- c(
    paste0("Higher in ", result$Target[1]),
    paste0("Higher in ", result$Reference[1]),
    "Not significant"
  )
  result[, Call := factor(Call, levels = call_levels)]

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    result,
    ggplot2::aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10_adj_p, color = Call)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.70, size = 1.4) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_thr, lfc_thr), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(alpha), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = stats::setNames(
      c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#999999"),
      call_levels
    )) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste0("Volcano plot: ", comparison),
      x = "log2 fold change",
      y = "-log10 adjusted p value",
      color = "Call"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = plot_font_size)

  save_plot(p, paste0("volcano_", short_id), width = 12, height = 10)
}

invisible(lapply(res_lst, plot_volcano))
```

# Significant-Protein Summary

```{r significant_summary}
cmp_sum[, ComparisonLabel := factor(
  paste0(ComparisonShortID, ": ", ComparisonID),
  levels = paste0(ComparisonShortID, ": ", ComparisonID)
)]

p_sig <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  cmp_sum,
  ggplot2::aes(x = ComparisonLabel, y = Significant_total)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.75, fill = "#0072B2") +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Significant proteins by Groups comparison",
    x = "Groups comparison",
    y = "Significant proteins"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = plot_font_size) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

save_plot(p_sig, "significant_proteins", width = 14, height = 8)
p_sig
```

# Batch Object

```{r batch_object}
batch_obj <- list(
  comparison_summary = cmp_sum,
  all_results_list = res_lst,
  all_results = res_all,
  sig_results = sig,
  protein_bio_mat_uncorrected = prot_m,
  bio_info = bio,
  protein_pca = prot_pca,
  settings = list(
    padj_method = adj_m,
    alpha = alpha,
    fc_cutoff = lfc_thr,
    min_detected = min_det,
    batch_variable = "Groups",
    batch_correction_applied = FALSE
  )
)

cmp_sum[, .(
  ComparisonShortID,
  ComparisonID,
  N_reference,
  N_target,
  Proteins_tested,
  Significant_total,
  Higher_in_target,
  Higher_in_reference
)]
```
